items.text: · Troopers brought Citizens’ Police Academy to Governor Mifflin High School in Berks County. Students learned about the tools and techniques used by PSP, including forensics and collision analysis. They toured the State Police Academy and learned about career opportunities.

items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · May 14 Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: John Markle was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.

· May 14 Troopers Colon and Galasso joined the Philly Phanatic at Citizens Bank Park to remind drivers to buckle up during the “Click It or Ticket” press conference hosted by the Phillies and PennDOT. Buckle up. Every trip, every time.

· May 13 K9 Rip, currently PSP’s only bloodhound, has assisted with many cases since August. K9 Rip and handler Trooper Petrof have successfully tracked people and discovered evidence across miles of terrain, including dozens of missing or endangered persons and criminal suspects.
